Podcast
Work Together

The Archetype Original Podcast — Guest Intake

Tell us who you are.

No box to fit into, no title required. This helps us build your episode page and gives Bart a few threads to pull on before you sit down together. Takes about five minutes.

About five minutes
Sent directly to Bart
Builds your episode page
You'll get a copy to reference

About you

A photo of you or your company logo. Used on your episode page. JPG or PNG, up to 10MB.

Click to upload, or drag and drop

Where to find you

Add as many as you'd like. We'll link these from your episode page.

A brief bio

Markdown is fine. Up to 5,000 characters. This appears on your episode page.

0 / 5000

01What's something people get wrong about you?
02Where are you right now that you didn't expect to be five years ago?
03What's a story from your life you think about more than people would guess?
04What are you into right now? Books, shows, hobbies, whatever.
05What else do you want us to know?

Finding a time to record

Recording sessions run about 60-90 minutes on Riverside. Suggest a few windows that work for you and Bart will confirm one.

Preferred days of the week
Preferred time of day

Release

By submitting this form, you confirm you are 18 years of age or older (or have legal capacity to enter this agreement).

You grant Archetype Original and Bart Paden permission to record, edit, publish, and distribute your conversation in audio and video formats, including clips and excerpts, across Spotify, Apple Podcasts, YouTube, archetypeoriginal.com, and AO's social media channels.

Your bio, photo, links, and submitted answers may be used on your episode page and in related promotional materials as you provide them.

Your email and phone number are for coordination only. They will never be published or shared.

The transcript and content of this conversation may be used to train and expand the Archetype Original knowledge corpus, an AI-powered system built on the body of work produced by Archetype Original.

You confirm that what you share is your own to share, and that you're not bound by any agreement that would prevent you from discussing it.

You retain the right to share and promote your appearance. Recording does not guarantee publication, and Archetype Original retains editorial discretion over what's published and how it's edited.

This is provided without compensation. This release has no expiration date and covers current and future use of the recorded content.

You'll get a copy of your answers by email, and Bart will reference this before your conversation.

What this is for

This information builds your episode page: your bio, links, and a short reference Bart can pull up before and during your conversation.

Nothing here is a script. Bart just likes to know who he's talking to.

No boxes

We don't book guests because of their title, and your story doesn't need to connect to business at all.

Answer what's true for you. Short or long, both are good.

Questions?

Reach out any time before the episode airs. Nothing here is final until your episode page goes live.

Archy

AI Leadership Assistant

Suggestions

Hi, I'm Archy.
I'm an AI that represents the work, philosophy, and experience of Bart Paden - a builder who's spent more than 32 years creating companies, growing people, and learning what makes both endure. You can ask me just about any question and I'll do my best to speak on his behalf. Go ahead and give it a try.
